name: agent-skills
description: Zapier agent skills for Codex. Built and maintained by Zapier teams.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for building, inspecting, and modifying Zapier Workflows from your agent.
interface.longDescription: A collection of skills authored by Zapier teams. The first cohort covers Zapier Workflows — install, create, list, history, and modify — and the set will grow as more teams contribute.
defaultPrompt: Install Zapier Workflows and bootstrap the workflow skills
Create a new Zapier Workflow from this description
List my Zapier Workflows and show recent run history
